\tzpentry{ID5851}{Alfven Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5851 introduces Alfven Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \omega^2 = k^2 v_A^2 \left(1 + \frac{k^2 \lambda_i^2}{1 + k^2 \rho_s^2}\right) \end{equation}
